title: Starving My Husband | #shorts
full_text: Oh my god. Shut up. Again, you're making protein shake. Why are you always drinking all these chemicals? >> I mean, >> I'm cooking all this food for you all day long. What is the point of it? >> What? >> My mom suggested it because if I the food at home is not enough, I can use this to supplement it. >> Your mom has ideas all the time about how we live. Why don't you just have her move in with us and cook for you all day? >> Is that a possibility?
